evals.name: bullet-point-input
evals.prompt:
Turn this into a Renna article:
- Fanwood Community Cleanup Day
- Saturday May 15
- 80 volunteers signed up
- Mayor Alice Johnson participating
- Focus: downtown area and Jackson Park
- Part of spring beautification initiative
- Contact: Fanwood Parks Dept
evals.expected_output: Publication-ready Renna-style article with headline, opening, body, and closer. Should read like polished news, not a formatted list. 200-300 words, community-focused angle.

evals.name: loose-paragraph-input
evals.prompt:
Turn this into a Renna article:
Dr. Sarah Patel runs a free clinic for uninsured residents in Summit. She's been doing this for 5 years, every Tuesday evening at the Summit Community Center. She just won a 2026 Community Health Hero award from the New Jersey Medical Association. She says healthcare is a human right and that's why she does this work.
evals.expected_output: Publication-ready Renna-style article with headline, opening, body, and closer. Should be polished and structured. 200-300 words, emphasizing community impact and her achievement.

evals.name: scattered-info-input
evals.prompt:
Turn this into a Renna article:
Berkeley Heights Library launching youth coding program - starts June 1, partnership with Code.org, after-school classes, ages 8-14, free, no prior experience needed, Wednesdays and Saturdays, first 50 kids get free coding kit, registration May 20, registration at library or online
evals.expected_output: Publication-ready Renna-style article with headline, opening, body, and closer. Should organize scattered facts into coherent narrative. 200-300 words, emphasizing youth opportunity and access.
